source_pr.title: table: fix insert into _tidb_rowid panic and rebase it if needed
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22029 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:
1. In the execution of the `INSERT` statement, `_tidb_rowid` is assumed to be the last column in select fields. This is incorrect.
2. `_tidb_rowid` does not rebase after explicit insertion.

### What is changed and how it works?


What's Changed: Omitted.


How it Works: Omitted.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch **?**

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Fix the 'index out of range ' issue when insert values to `tidb_rowid`.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select *, ((1 << (64-5-1)) - 1) & _tidb_rowid from t order by a;").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (executor/rowid_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select *, ((1 << (64-5-1)) - 1) & _tidb_rowid from t order by a;").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (executor/rowid_test.go)
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select *, ((1 << (64-5-1)) - 1) & _tidb_rowid from t order by a;").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (executor/rowid_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select *, ((1 << (64-5-1)) - 1) & _tidb_rowid from t order by a;").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1")) (executor/rowid_test.go)
files: ddl/column.go, ddl/ddl_api.go, executor/insert_common.go, executor/rowid_test.go, executor/write.go, meta/autoid/autoid.go, table/tables/tables.go
